mapper.select:
SELECT a.year, a.month , COUNT(*) CNT , SUM(cnt2) CNT2 FROM ( SELECT YEAR(a.reg_de) "year", MONTH(a.reg_de) "month" , (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM t_lecture_stdnt WHERE edu_seq = a.edu_seq AND rcept_seq = a.rcept_seq AND user_id = a.user_id AND pass_yn = 'Y') cnt2 FROM t_lecture_rcept a WHERE a.state = 1
AND a.REG_DE >= #{startDtime} ) a GROUP BY a.year, a.month ORDER BY a.year, a.month

SELECT COUNT(*) TOTAL_EDU_CNT , IFNULL(SUM(CASE WHEN rcept_period_begin <= DATE_FORMAT(NOW(), '%Y%m%d%H%i') AND rcept_period_end >= DATE_FORMAT(NOW(), '%Y%m%d%H%i') AND (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM t_lecture_stdnt WHERE state IN (1, 2, 4) AND edu_seq = a.edu_seq) < personnel THEN 1 ELSE 0 END),0) RCEPT_EDU_CNT , IFNULL(SUM(CASE WHEN CLOSE_YN ='N' AND edu_period_begin <= DATE_FORMAT(NOW(), '%Y%m%d%H%i') AND edu_period_end >= DATE_FORMAT(NOW(), '%Y%m%d%H%i') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END),0) PLAY_EDU_CNT FROM t_lecture a WHERE open_yn = 'Y'
AND reg_de >= DATE_FORMAT(NOW(), '%Y-01-01 00:00:00')

SELECT COUNT(*) TOTAL_RCEPT_STDNT_CNT , IFNULL(SUM(CASE WHEN REG_DE >= #{startDtime} THEN 1 ELSE 0 END),0) NOW_RCEPT_STDNT_CNT FROM t_lecture_rcept WHERE state = 1
AND reg_de >= DATE_FORMAT(NOW(), '%Y-01-01 00:00:00')

SELECT COUNT(*) TOTAL_COMPL_STDNT_CNT FROM t_lecture_stdnt a WHERE pass_yn = 'Y'
AND (SELECT reg_de FROM t_lecture_rcept WHERE rcept_seq = a.rcept_seq AND edu_seq = a.edu_seq AND user_id = a.user_id) >= DATE_FORMAT(NOW(), '%Y-01-01 00:00:00')

select a.edu_seq ,a.edu_nm ,b.time_seq ,b.edu_dt ,b.class_how ,c.user_id,c.user_nm ,c.email ,d.mov_all_time,d.mov_time ,(select min(e.reg_time) from t_online_history e where e.edu_seq=a.edu_seq and e.time_seq=b.time_seq and e.user_id=c.user_id) access_date from t_lecture a inner join t_lecture_time b on a.edu_seq =b.edu_seq inner join t_lecture_stdnt c on a.edu_seq=c.edu_seq left join t_lecture_time_stdnt d on a.edu_seq =d.edu_seq and b.time_seq =d.time_seq and c.user_id =d.user_id where a.edu_seq =#{eduSeq} and a.org_cd=#{orgCd} order by b.time_seq

select count(*) from t_lecture a where edu_seq in ( select edu_seq from t_lecture_stdnt where user_id=#{userId} and pass_yn='N' ) AND ( date_format(now(),'%Y-%m-%d') BETWEEN a.EDU_PERIOD_BEGIN and a.EDU_PERIOD_END )
select count(*) from t_lecture where edu_seq in ( select edu_seq from t_lecture_stdnt where user_id=#{userId} and pass_yn='Y' )
select sum(personnel) from t_lecture where detail_ctgry_seq=#{detailCtgrySeq}
